declared_unit: A single 150 kVA Vegetable Oil Filled Transformer (including packaging) operating throughout its entire service life, which is 35 years.
note: The results tables report A1, A2 and A3 in separate columns with no aggregated A1-A3 column, so values were summed. GWP-total: A1=4.31E3+A2=1.17E2+A3=5.15E2=4942. GWP-fossil: 4.68E3+1.17E2+5.04E2=5301. GWP-biogenic: -7.07E2+2.49E-2+9.14E0=-697.84. GWP-GHG: 3.77E3+1.16E2+5.02E2=4388 (from additional mandatory table). Module D not declared.
